typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{PROJECT NO.} as string,
		{PROJECT ID} as string,
		{PROJECT NAME} as string,
		{CLIENT NAME} as string,
		{SUPPLIER NAME} as string,
		{REQ_PO NO.} as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		{DOC ID} as string,
		{TYPE CLASS} as string,
		{DOCUMENT NUMBER} as string,
		{SUPPLIER DOC. NO.} as string,
		TITLE as string,
		{REVISION NO.} as string,
		{SUPPLIER REVISION} as string,
		{RECEIVED DATE} as string,
		{RETURN DATE} as string,
		{REVISION DATE} as string,
		{ISSUE STATE} as string,
		{OFFICE LOCATION} as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		{DOCUMENT CLASS} as string,
		{SDR CODE} as string,
		{TOTAL CURRENT PROGRESS} as string,
		{SUPERSEDED BY} as string,
		FACILITY_PLANT_UNIT as string,
		EWP as string,
		CWA as string,
		CWP as string,
		HOLD as string,
		{TAG_EQUIPMENT NUMBER} as string,
		{REQUISITION ENGINEER} as string,
		{REASON FOR CHANGE SUPPLIER} as string,
		EXPEDITOR as string,
		SUPPLIER_RECEIVED_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		APPROVED_WCOMMENTS_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		APPROVED_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		{CONTRACT NO.} as string,
		{IDOCS FOLDER} as string,
		{IDOCS URL} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/iDocs/Doc_Master_Ven/Latest_iDocs_doc_ven.csv']) ~> srcDocVenRaw
srcDocVenRaw derive(WORK_PACKAGE = iif(
    isNull(CWP),
    'null',
    regexExtract(CWP,`(\d+-[a-zA-Z]{2}\d+)`,1)
)) ~> DataTransform
DataTransform sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		stage_idoc_doc_ven_id as integer,
		PROJECT_NAME as string,
		PROJECT_NUMBER as string,
		PROJECT_ID as string,
		CLIENT_NAME as string,
		SUPPLIER_NAME as string,
		REQ_PO_NUMBER as string,
		DOC_ID as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		TYPE_CLASS as string,
		DOCUMENT_NUMBER as string,
		SUPPLIER_DOC_NUMBER as string,
		Title as string,
		Revision_Number as string,
		SUPPLIER_REVISION as string,
		Received_Date as string,
		Return_Date as string,
		Revision_Date as string,
		Issue_State as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		OFFICE_LOCATION as string,
		DOCUMENT_CLASS as string,
		SDR_Code as string,
		TOTAL_CURRENT_PROGRESS as string,
		SUPERSEDED_BY as string,
		FACILITY_PLANT_UNIT as string,
		EWP as string,
		CWA as string,
		CWP as string,
		HOLDS as string,
		TAG_EQUIPMENT_NUMBER as string,
		REQUISITION_ENGINEER as string,
		Reason_for_change as string,
		EXPEDITOR as string,
		SUPPLIER_RECEIVED_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		APPROVED_WCOMMENTS_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		APPROVED_ACTIVITY_ID as string,
		CONTRACT_NO as string,
		IDOCS_FOLDER as string,
		IDOCS_URL as string,
		WORK_PACKAGE as string
	),
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
	mapColumn(
		PROJECT_NUMBER = {PROJECT NO.},
		PROJECT_ID = {PROJECT ID},
		PROJECT_NAME = {PROJECT NAME},
		CLIENT_NAME = {CLIENT NAME},
		SUPPLIER_NAME = {SUPPLIER NAME},
		REQ_PO_NUMBER = {REQ_PO NO.},
		DELIVERABLE,
		DOC_ID = {DOC ID},
		TYPE_CLASS = {TYPE CLASS},
		DOCUMENT_NUMBER = {DOCUMENT NUMBER},
		SUPPLIER_DOC_NUMBER = {SUPPLIER DOC. NO.},
		Title = TITLE,
		Revision_Number = {REVISION NO.},
		SUPPLIER_REVISION = {SUPPLIER REVISION},
		Received_Date = {RECEIVED DATE},
		Return_Date = {RETURN DATE},
		Revision_Date = {REVISION DATE},
		Issue_State = {ISSUE STATE},
		OFFICE_LOCATION = {OFFICE LOCATION},
		DISCIPLINE,
		DOCUMENT_CLASS = {DOCUMENT CLASS},
		SDR_Code = {SDR CODE},
		TOTAL_CURRENT_PROGRESS = {TOTAL CURRENT PROGRESS},
		SUPERSEDED_BY = {SUPERSEDED BY},
		FACILITY_PLANT_UNIT,
		EWP,
		CWA,
		CWP,
		HOLDS = HOLD,
		TAG_EQUIPMENT_NUMBER = {TAG_EQUIPMENT NUMBER},
		REQUISITION_ENGINEER = {REQUISITION ENGINEER},
		Reason_for_change = {REASON FOR CHANGE SUPPLIER},
		EXPEDITOR,
		WORK_PACKAGE,
		SUPPLIER_RECEIVED_ACTIVITY_ID,
		APPROVED_WCOMMENTS_ACTIVITY_ID,
		APPROVED_ACTIVITY_ID,
		CONTRACT_NO = {CONTRACT NO.},
		IDOCS_FOLDER = {IDOCS FOLDER},
		IDOCS_URL = {IDOCS URL}
	)) ~> snkDocVenSynapse
